prompt_text:
### Demographics: 68-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Worsening edema and dyspnea over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Pioglitazone 15mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 104.1 kg; Height 178.3 cm; BMI 32.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/81 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.8%; 9 months ago 7.0%; 6 months ago 6.7%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 135mg/dL; 9 months ago 177mg/dL; 6 months ago 155mg/dL; 3 months ago 146mg/dL; current 177mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 104.3kg; 9 months ago 102.3kg; 6 months ago 101.3kg; 3 months ago 100.7kg; current 104.1kg), Height (12 months ago 178.3cm; 9 months ago 178.3cm; 6 months ago 178.3cm; 3 months ago 178.3cm; current 178.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 81mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 32U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 11U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 102mg/g; 9 months ago 100mg/g; 6 months ago 115mg/g; 3 months ago 83mg/g; current 105mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 102mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 161mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 9.8g/dL; 9 months ago 9.7g/dL; 6 months ago 9.7g/dL; 3 months ago 9.7g/dL; current 10.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
